summary: Complete verification of all 12 requested features. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly, Quick Fleet Import modal working, Ship Comparison working with 3 ships, Loadout Builder showing hardpoint validation.

issues: Console warning: Duplicate React keys for ships like 'eclipse', 'carrack', 'apollo-medivac' - data has duplicate IDs from live API

passed_tests: User Login: tester1/test123 redirects to dashboard - PASSED
Dashboard: Shows stats (276 ships, 13 vehicles, 333 components, 178 weapons) - PASSED
Ships page: Shows 276 ships with images, search works (Carrack shows 3 results) - PASSED
Fleet page: Quick Import button visible - PASSED
Quick Import Modal: Opens with search, manufacturer filter, size filter - PASSED
Quick Import: Search for Aurora shows 26 ships - PASSED
Quick Import: Ship selection works, Import button shows count - PASSED
Vehicles page: Shows 13 ground vehicles with 11 images - PASSED
Components page: Size filter working (Size 1 shows 115 items) - PASSED
Weapons page: Type filter (Energy shows 123), Size filter (Size 2 shows 37) - PASSED
Compare page: Add Ship modal loads 276 ships, can add 3 ships to comparison table - PASSED
Loadout Builder: Arrow ship shows 7 slots (shields, power, cooler, quantum, 3 weapons) - PASSED
Ship Detail: Avenger Stalker shows full specs with description - PASSED
Backend pytest: 9/9 tests passed including bulk-add, fleet CRUD, CACHE_TTL verification - PASSED
action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate React keys warning - ships like 'eclipse', 'carrack', 'apollo-medivac' have duplicate IDs in live API data. Consider using index-based keys or unique compound keys.
critical_code_review_comments: Quick Import modal correctly implements bulk ship selection with search/filter/multi-select
Loadout Builder properly validates hardpoint sizes (shows 'Max S2' for weapon slots)
Ship Comparison table shows visual stat bars for numeric comparisons
All data-testid selectors are properly implemented for testing
CACHE_TTL=3600 in live_api.py enables hourly data auto-refresh
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test user with unique UUID prefix, cleanup handled via fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. The app pulls live data from Star Citizen Wiki API (276 ships, 13 vehicles, 333 components, 178 weapons). Quick Import at /fleet allows bulk adding ships. Loadout Builder at /loadout allows equipment customization with size validation. Ship Comparison at /compare allows up to 5 ships side-by-side. Minor issue: Some ship IDs are duplicated in live API data causing React key warnings.
